Kadir Has University

Architecture

Kadir Has University Department of Architecture educates creative and critical thinking professionals by addressing the discipline of architecture in an environmental, social and cultural context. Supported by project-based education, field trips and internships, the department contributes to the practice of modern architecture by using digital design technologies.
